title: Spawn Point
description: Configure which dimension you spawn in!
body:
This mod allows you to specify which dimension your world's spawn will be.

This mod changes the spawn dimension at a fundamental level, meaning your [spawn chunks](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Spawn_chunk) will be set in the dimension you specify during world creation.

Also, there is handling for dimensions like the nether for spawn finding.

As a bonus, because this goes a bit further than other similar mods it supports other mods like Serilum's [Starter Structure](https://modrinth.com/mod/starter-structure) mod!
